initial_candidates.sql:
WITH pre_period AS (
    SELECT 
        region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type,
        AVG(sales) AS avg_sales_pre
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE week_date BETWEEN '2020-03-28' AND '2020-06-14'
    GROUP BY region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type
),
post_period AS (
    SELECT 
        region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type,
        AVG(sales) AS avg_sales_post
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE week_date BETWEEN '2020-06-15' AND '2020-09-06'
    GROUP BY region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type
),
combined AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(p.region, po.region) AS region,
        COALESCE(p.platform, po.platform) AS platform,
        COALESCE(p.age_band, po.age_band) AS age_band,
        COALESCE(p.demographic, po.demographic) AS demographic,
        COALESCE(p.customer_type, po.customer_type) AS customer_type,
        p.avg_sales_pre,
        po.avg_sales_post,
        CASE 
            WHEN p.avg_sales_pre IS NOT NULL AND p.avg_sales_pre != 0 
            THEN ((po.avg_sales_post - p.avg_sales_pre) / p.avg_sales_pre) * 100
            ELSE NULL
        END AS percentage_change
    FROM pre_period p
    FULL OUTER JOIN post_period po 
        ON p.region = po.region 
        AND p.platform = po.platform 
        AND p.age_band = po.age_band 
        AND p.demographic = po.demographic 
        AND p.customer_type = po.customer_type
),
unpivoted AS (
    SELECT 'region' AS attr_type, region AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'platform' AS attr_type, platform AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'age_band' AS attr_type, age_band AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'demographic' AS attr_type, demographic AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'customer_type' AS attr_type, customer_type AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
),
avg_by_attr_type AS (
    SELECT 
        attr_type,
        AVG(percentage_change) AS avg_percentage_change
    FROM unpivoted
    WHERE percentage_change IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY attr_type
)
SELECT 
    attr_type,
    avg_percentage_change
FROM avg_by_attr_type
ORDER BY avg_percentage_change ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH sales_periods AS (
    SELECT 
        region,
        platform,
        age_band,
        demographic,
        customer_type,
        SUM(CASE WHEN week_date BETWEEN '2020-04-01' AND '2020-06-14' THEN sales ELSE 0 END) AS sales_before,
        SUM(CASE WHEN week_date BETWEEN '2020-06-15' AND '2020-08-31' THEN sales ELSE 0 END) AS sales_after
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE week_date BETWEEN '2020-04-01' AND '2020-08-31'
    GROUP BY region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type
),
percentage_changes AS (
    SELECT 
        region,
        platform,
        age_band,
        demographic,
        customer_type,
        CASE 
            WHEN sales_before = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE ((sales_after - sales_before) / sales_before) * 100
        END AS percentage_change
    FROM sales_periods
),
unpivoted AS (
    SELECT 'region' AS attr_type, region AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM percentage_changes
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'platform', platform, percentage_change FROM percentage_changes
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'age_band', age_band, percentage_change FROM percentage_changes
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'demographic', demographic, percentage_change FROM percentage_changes
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'customer_type', customer_type, percentage_change FROM percentage_changes
),
avg_by_attr_type AS (
    SELECT 
        attr_type,
        AVG(percentage_change) AS avg_percentage_change
    FROM unpivoted
    WHERE percentage_change IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY attr_type
)
SELECT 
    attr_type,
    avg_percentage_change
FROM avg_by_attr_type
ORDER BY avg_percentage_change ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH sales_before AS (
    SELECT 
        region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type,
        AVG(sales) AS avg_sales_before
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE week_date BETWEEN '2020-03-27' AND '2020-06-06'
    GROUP BY region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type
),
sales_after AS (
    SELECT 
        region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type,
        AVG(sales) AS avg_sales_after
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE week_date BETWEEN '2020-06-19' AND '2020-09-11'
    GROUP BY region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type
),
combined AS (
    SELECT 
        b.region, b.platform, b.age_band, b.demographic, b.customer_type,
        b.avg_sales_before, a.avg_sales_after,
        ((a.avg_sales_after - b.avg_sales_before) / b.avg_sales_before) * 100 AS percentage_change
    FROM sales_before b
    JOIN sales_after a
    ON b.region = a.region 
       AND b.platform = a.platform 
       AND b.age_band = a.age_band 
       AND b.demographic = a.demographic 
       AND b.customer_type = a.customer_type
),
unpivoted AS (
    SELECT 'region' AS attr_type, region AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'platform' AS attr_type, platform AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'age_band' AS attr_type, age_band AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'demographic' AS attr_type, demographic AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'customer_type' AS attr_type, customer_type AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
)
SELECT attr_type, AVG(percentage_change) AS avg_percentage_change
FROM unpivoted
GROUP BY attr_type
ORDER BY avg_percentage_change ASC
LIMIT 1

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH sales_before AS (
    SELECT 
        region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type,
        AVG(sales) AS avg_sales_before
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE week_date BETWEEN '2020-03-27' AND '2020-06-06'
    GROUP BY region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type
),
sales_after AS (
    SELECT 
        region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type,
        AVG(sales) AS avg_sales_after
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE week_date BETWEEN '2020-06-19' AND '2020-09-11'
    GROUP BY region, platform, age_band, demographic, customer_type
),
combined AS (
    SELECT 
        b.region, b.platform, b.age_band, b.demographic, b.customer_type,
        b.avg_sales_before, a.avg_sales_after,
        ((a.avg_sales_after - b.avg_sales_before) / b.avg_sales_before) * 100 AS percentage_change
    FROM sales_before b
    JOIN sales_after a
    ON b.region = a.region 
       AND b.platform = a.platform 
       AND b.age_band = a.age_band 
       AND b.demographic = a.demographic 
       AND b.customer_type = a.customer_type
),
unpivoted AS (
    SELECT 'region' AS attr_type, region AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'platform' AS attr_type, platform AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'age_band' AS attr_type, age_band AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'demographic' AS attr_type, demographic AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'customer_type' AS attr_type, customer_type AS attr_value, percentage_change FROM combined
)
SELECT attr_type, AVG(percentage_change) AS avg_percentage_change
FROM unpivoted
GROUP BY attr_type
ORDER BY avg_percentage_change ASC
LIMIT 1
